daily_briefing.headline: A single real account following only our proven champion would hold $10,016.09 after the FULL fee+tax+withdrawal chain — vs $10,054.51 on paper.

what: The dress rehearsal: one $10k account, only proven quadrants funded, headline = net spendable cash.
honest_note: v1 adopts the proven book's REAL trades (crypto today) and runs them through the complete reality chain — it does not yet run its own independent cross-quadrant simulator (that is the v2 build). Tax 25% and a $5 withdrawal are placeholders, not advice. Rejected quadrants are rejected because they have not proven a positive net-after-fee edge — that is the honest state, and they stay in R&D until they do. This is a rehearsal on paper; live fills still slip.
